output:
Implemented T2 in `useTimelineSave.ts`: moved 406 handling out of `useMutation.onError` and into `saveTimeline`'s async `try/catch`, added `conflictRetryRef` plus `MAX_CONFLICT_RETRIES`, refreshed `configVersionRef` via `provider.loadTimeline(timelineId)` before retry, and retried immediately inside the active save cycle without going back through debounce. Also reset `conflictRetryRef.current` on successful save and at the start of each debounced user save. Verified with targeted inspection and `npx eslint src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineSave.ts`.

Best-effort checkpointing was not written because `.megaplan/plans/light-megaplan-fix-the-20260327-0056/execution_batch_2.json` was not writable.
deviations: Advisory audit finding: Executor claimed changed files not present in git status: src/tools/video-editor/components/VideoEditorShell.tsx

Advisory audit finding: Git status shows changed files not claimed by any task: .megaplan/debt.json, .megaplan/plans/light-megaplan-consolidate-20260327-0022, .megaplan/plans/light-megaplan-fix-the-20260327-0056
Advisory audit finding: Sense check SC3 is missing an executor acknowledgment.
Advisory audit finding: Sense check SC4 is missing an executor acknowledgment.
Advisory audit finding: Sense check SC5 is missing an executor acknowledgment.
Advisory audit finding: Sense check SC6 is missing an executor acknowledgment.

task_updates.executor_notes: Added `MAX_CONFLICT_RETRIES` and `conflictRetryRef`, removed the synchronous `useMutation.onError`, and moved conflict handling into `saveTimeline`'s async `catch`. On 406, the hook now awaits `provider.loadTimeline(timelineId)`, updates `configVersionRef.current`, increments `conflictRetryRef.current`, and immediately re-enters `saveTimeline(..., { bypassQueue: true })` instead of scheduling through debounce. Successful saves reset `conflictRetryRef.current = 0`, and the debounced user save path also resets it before invoking `saveTimeline`. Verified by targeted code inspection and passing ESLint on `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineSave.ts`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Verified the retry path bypasses debounce: (a) 406 recovery now retries from inside `saveTimeline` via `await saveTimeline(dataRef.current, editSeqRef.current, { bypassQueue: true })`, with no `scheduleSave` call on the conflict path; (b) `conflictRetryRef.current` resets to `0` in the mutation success handler and again in the `scheduleSave` timeout before a new debounced save starts; (c) the conflict branch awaits `provider.loadTimeline(timelineId)` and sets `configVersionRef.current = loaded.configVersion` before the retry save is invoked.
